positive: A central, maximalist botanical wreath composition, featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate jungle vines, and stylized celestial elements like crescent moons and star constellations. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau meets vintage scientific illustration, utilizing high contrast silhouettes and fine line work. Color palette is limited to deep sapphire blue, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and cream white. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed to be an isolated, print-ready design suitable for apparel printing, emphasizing crisp edges and clean separation of color zones. Highly detailed, magical, ethereal, symmetrical composition, dramatic ambient lighting.
negative: artifacts, blur, poor anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, low resolution, noise, extra limbs, messy, amateur, bad composition, faded, gradient wash, messy details
